title: AI Could Eventually Be a Huge Chunk of Crypto Miners’ Revenue
description: Investors monitoring the goings on in the realm of equity-based cryptocurrency know that many crypto miners are undergoing corporate transformations to become artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure companies. This also includes many residing in the CoinShares Bitcoin Mining ETF (WGMI). The crypto-to-AI pivot has become a frequently discussed topic and one that is already paying off [...]The post AI Could Eventually Be a Huge Chunk of Crypto Miners’ Revenue appeared first on ETF Trends.
